message:
fix(e2e): resolve compilation and test failures across 13 E2E compliance suites

Add missing RiskLevel/SafetyTier/OperationInfo imports, fix incorrect
subdomain assertions in network guard tests, correct sendgrid operation
count, and remove unused InvokeStatus import in evernote.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
